abilities.name: Delta Block
abilities.text: As long as any Stadium card with Holon in its name is in play, your opponent can't use any Poke-Powers on his or her Pokemon that has δ on its card.

attacks.name: Mind Play
attacks.text: Choose 1 card from your opponent's hand without looking. Look at the card, then have your opponent shuffle it into his or her deck. If that card is a Trainer card, this attack does 30 damage plus 30 more damage.

tests.name: delta_block_with_holon_stadium
tests.description: Test Delta Block prevents opponent's delta Poke-Powers

tests.name: mind_play_bonus
tests.description: Test Mind Play does +30 if Trainer card shuffled
